title: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Singers EJAE, Audrey Nuna and Rei Ami Perform ‘Golden’ at BRIT Awards
summary: EJAE, Audrey Nuna and Rei Ami — the voices behind Huntr/x in Netflix’s smash hit “KPop Demon Hunters” — continued their U.K. awards show domination by performing “Golden” at the BRIT Awards on Saturday night. Following Harry Styles’ opening performance, the trio gave an explosive rendition of “Gold…
